mapper.select: SELECT seat_id, show_id, schedule_id, user_id, res_seat_label, seat_label, seat_grade, seat_status, hold_at FROM seat_tbl WHERE show_id = #{showId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND schedule_id = #{scheduleId, jdbcType=INTEGER} ORDER BY seat_label
mapper.update: UPDATE seat_tbl SET seat_status = 'AVAILABLE', user_id = NULL, hold_at = NULL WHERE seat_status = 'HELD' AND hold_at < SUBTIME(NOW(), '0:5:0')
